generated_by: harness drift normalization Wave 2 Agent A2 (PR-1); 2026-06-10 refresh: +3 AppSec skills (security-app-api / security-platform-supply-chain / security-compliance-privacy), hook-enumeration pointer; 2026-06-10 +cross_ai_dispatch (codex-dispatch — decision/discipline playbook over official codex@openai-codex plugin, NOT a codex-exec wrapper)
description: Global ~/.claude/ skill manifest. Defines 5 primary orchestrators (1 manual-first bootstrap + 4 commercial-grade three-mainline) and how supporting skills are tiered beneath them. v2.0.0 adds hooks/sdks/evidence_roots/name_freeze top-level blocks for harness-level coverage of AppSec v3.0 GSD-lite engine + L12 discoverability + QA layered matrix + UIUX subsystem. Claude routes through primary orchestrators first; supporting skills are invoked by orchestrators or by explicit user request.

primary_orchestrators.name: claude-env-bootstrap
primary_orchestrators.purpose: Interactive project-level Claude environment setup and repair. Scans project signals, asks high-leverage questions, composes a tailored .claude/ environment in real time, and synchronizes the global ~/.claude/ catalog into the project.

primary_orchestrators.name: gsd-pipeline-orchestrator
primary_orchestrators.purpose: PM-style commercial delivery: requirements / acceptance criteria / spec / discuss / plan / execute / verify / ship. Routes phase commands and coordinates with UIUX / QA / AppSec orchestrators.

primary_orchestrators.name: uiux-product-orchestrator
primary_orchestrators.purpose: UIUX workflow routing: foundation (ux-principles) -> discovery -> exploration -> source import -> style lock (L3 exclusive) -> production -> platform overlay -> audit -> design system -> assets. Acts as a thin routing layer; delegates execution to underlying UIUX skills. Downstream L12 release gate via discoverability-orchestrator (SEO/AEO/Local-SEO/ASO).

primary_orchestrators.name: enterprise-qa-testing
primary_orchestrators.purpose: 9-layer QA matrix (static / unit / component / integration / contract / E2E / visual / a11y / performance + smoke). Sets CI quality gates. Routes backend/API/auth/data work to appsec-security-orchestrator.

primary_orchestrators.name: appsec-security-orchestrator
primary_orchestrators.role: AppSec Orchestrator (v3.0 — GSD-lite execution engine + NIST CSF 2.0 + ASVS 5.0)
primary_orchestrators.trigger_mode: auto when triggers present (backend / API / auth / user-data / file-upload / payment / admin / production)
primary_orchestrators.purpose: Defensive AppSec orchestrator (v3.0 GSD-lite execution engine). Self-dispatches via named subagents (appsec-risk-classifier, appsec-finding-triager, appsec-evidence-validator) backed by appsec-sdk.sh canonical evidence sink at `.appsec/evidence/<tag>/` and project-level hooks (enumeration & triggers per manifests/hook-registry.json) installed via `appsec-sdk init` (config-gated by `.appsec/config.json`). Routes through 6-layer capability map (governance / app / platform / operations / response / compliance) and aligns with NIST CSF 2.0 six functions (Govern / Identify / Protect / Detect / Respond / Recover) + ASVS 5.0 V1-V17 + WSTG passive + API Top 10 2023 + standardized finding schema. NEVER performs active scans; active work gated by pentest-scope-and-roe (ROE governance) + authorized-pentest-validation (manual hard gate, disable-model-invocation: true).

routing_rule: Claude should route through primary orchestrators first. Supporting skills are invoked by orchestrators or by explicit user request. The 4 commercial-grade primary orchestrators (GSD / UIUX / QA / AppSec) form the three-mainline architecture; claude-env-bootstrap is the project-setup gate.
anti_patterns: Multiple L3 styles simultaneously activated (taste/luxury/minimalist/soft are mutually exclusive)
Workflow skills used as primary style lock (redesign / image-to-code are workflow helpers, not L3 style locks)
Auto-invoking authorized-pentest-validation or any active security testing skill without explicit user request
Skipping ROE checklist before active security testing
Updating visual regression baselines without user authorization
Routing AppSec work to enterprise-qa-testing without handoff (must route to appsec-security-orchestrator)
Calling claude-env-bootstrap without user explicit request (it has side effects)
Auto-firing anchor-prototype-wave (manual-first; user must explicitly request)
Renaming safety-critical skills (pentest-scope-and-roe / authorized-pentest-validation / dast-baseline-scanning) — the manual invocation phrase IS part of the control surface
Using ASVS 4.x V2-V13 chapter identifiers in new findings (must use ASVS 5.0 v5.0.0-X.Y.Z)
Treating OWASP LLM Top 10 as complete coverage for Agentic AI (need tool-perm boundaries, memory poisoning, indirect prompt injection, evals, human override, rollback)
Running gitleaks detect without --redact flag (raw secrets must never appear in chat/logs/reports)
Merging gsd-secure-phase into appsec-security-orchestrator (GSD namespace boundary is intentional)
